resultList.dtldesc: Introducing an exceptional opportunity to acquire a spacious and well-appointed 3 BHK flat in the prestigious Mirambica Aditya Parivesh, situated in the thriving neighborhood of Gota, Ahmedabad. This immaculate residence offers a harmonious blend of modern living, convenience, and a prime location, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a new home in this dynamic city.::::::Property Specifications::::::Resting on the top floor of a 5-storey building, this 3 BHK apartment is thoughtfully constructed and spans across a super area of 1440 sqft. The flat comes unfurnished so residents will have complete liberty of personalising it according to their tastes and needs, which is an added advantage. ::::::Being vaastu compliant is another highlight of this property and the flat faces the auspicious east direction. Moving to the layout, the flat consists of 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms ( 1 Indian, 2 western), a living cum dining area, and a kitchen with piped gas connection. Moreover, 2 of the bathrooms are attached to bedrooms and the remaining is for common use.::::::Additionally, there are 2 balconies in the flat of which 1 is connected to a bedroom and the other to a kitchen as a utility area. Both balconies offer an unblocked view of the garden. Vitrified tiles are used for the flooring in all rooms, which further uplifts the overall grace of this abode.::::::Facilities::::::This property is endowed with 1 covered parking and 1 open parking space. It ensures 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources and provides 100% power backup. The property is secured with a dedicated security guard and CCTV installations. Additionally, there are lifts for convenient access within the building.::::::Locality::::::This property is near Apollo Junior High School and offers easy access to essential conveniences. Schools, hospitals, and a D Mart are within a 1-kilometer radius. Banks/ATMs are also close by, and public transport options are readily available. Additionally, the property is located near a railway station and a metro station, ensuring excellent connectivity for residents.::
